name: intent-planner
description: A lightweight intent-planning layer for AI coding agents (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI) that keeps implementation aligned with your product intent. Capture goals, invariants, and decision criteria before writing specs, hand them off to spec-driven workflows (kiro / cc-sdd / OpenSpec / Spec Kit), observe intent drift with warn-only checks, and write implementation learnings back into your intent documents. One-shot npx setup.
author: Yoshishige Tsuji <tsuji@coccole.biz>
